channel.title: Projects on HUAHUA
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on HUAHUA

item.description: ohmymac ohmymac is a statusbar-only application, which is used to extend functionality of mac. ohmymac is currently under development. For now Window ‼️ WARNNING Disable the Stage Manager You will find the most recent three windows in the menu bar. cmd+tab has been overwritten by ohmymac, when you press cmd+tab, the menubar will show a list of all windows, and it will hightlight the selected window. (In the fucture, you may be able to choose your custom shortcut instead of cmd+tab)
Soteria Soteria1 is a secure neural network framework based on trusted hardware. Overview Soteria Wiki ↩︎
